title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Sanji, Big Mom as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I was about to completely prune up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What are you saying?! Come with me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My own captain to the best of my ability...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Despite the fact that you came here to save me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I no longer have the right to return to your ship.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My greatest saviors... the shitty gramps you already met and his crew from back where I was raised...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are all being held as hostage right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: In case I screw up somehow.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way I can run from the wedding ceremony tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My bloody family has been framed by big mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In a few hours from now, they'll all be killed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no obligation towards them and they're definitely all rotten to the core...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't have it in me to let them die off either!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
